---
title: "Memoirs of Marshal Bugeaud from his private correspondence and original documents 1784-1849.  By the Count H. D’Ideville. Edited from the French by Charlotte M. Yonge,  2 vols"
---

## Memoirs of Marshal Bugeaud from his private correspondence and original documents 1784-1849.  By the Count H. D’Ideville. Edited from the French by Charlotte M. Yonge,  2 vols

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1884
**Genre:** Edited translation
**Format:** Edited book

**Publisher:** London : Hurst and Blackett, 13 Great Marlborough Street.

### Notes

Probably translated by Julian Bargus Yonge.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
